issues.description: Effect is missing the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic. DSL must include a ViewDeck or similar action to examine top 5 cards before playing one.
Filter is incomplete. Must specify: type='Supernovas', power≤2000, AND exclude card name 'Basil Hawkins'. Current filter only checks cost (which is not the same as power).

SearchDeck action is incorrect for this effect. The card text requires viewing 5 cards from top of deck, then conditionally playing 1, then placing rest at bottom in any order. This requires a multi-step sequence not captured by a single SearchDeck action.
Filter uses 'ByCost' but effect references 'power'. These are different attributes. Should use power-based filtering.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On K.O.] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; play up to 1 {Supernovas} type Character card with 2000 power or less other than [Basil Hawkins]. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
